title: Sunday Worship & Fellowship Hour
description: Weekly praise and worship service followed by fellowship time and light snacks for all youth members.

title: Bible Study: Living as the Anointed
description: A study series on identity in Christ, small-group discussion, and a short worship set led by the music team.

title: Outreach Prep Meeting
description: Planning session for our upcoming community outreach — assignments, materials, and prayer time.
